hooks.command: echo 'Cure Consulting Group ProductEngineeringSkills plugin loaded (v7.1.5). 80 skills (domain-organized), 39 agents, 4 personas, 11 rules, 9 output styles, 4 MCP servers, 2 LSP servers. Use /cure-product-engineering:<skill-name> to invoke. Run /cure-product-engineering:project-bootstrap to set up a new project.'

echo "Git branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'not a git repo'). Uncommitted changes: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '). Last commit: $(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')."

if [ -f package.json ]; then OUTDATED=$(npm outdated --json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d))" 2>/dev/null || echo '0'); if [ "$OUTDATED" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "Dependency check: $OUTDATED outdated packages. Consider running dependency-auditor agent."; fi; fi

echo '
Available Agents (39):
  Engineering: code-reviewer, test-runner, pr-reviewer, refactor-assistant, ci-debugger, release-coordinator, doc-generator, codebase-explainer, migration-validator, deployment-validator, dependency-auditor, api-validator, project-bootstrapper, qa-engineer, system-architect
  Product: product-analyst, ux-researcher, roadmap-strategist, competitive-intel
  Marketing: content-strategist, campaign-analyst, brand-guardian, growth-analyst, technical-content-strategist
  Business: financial-analyst, market-intelligence, investor-relations, contract-reviewer, ops-finance, investment-banker, equity-analyst, private-equity-analyst
  Data: data-analyst, metrics-dashboard, ab-test-analyst
  Security & Legal: accessibility-checker, firebase-security-auditor, legal-compliance, skill-security-auditor

Available Personas (4): cure-tech-lead, cure-product-lead, cure-engagement-pm, cure-solo-consultant'

echo 'CONTEXT RE-INJECTION AFTER COMPACTION:

Cure Consulting Group Standards (always apply):
- Clean Architecture: domain (pure logic) / data (DTOs + repos) / presentation (VMs + UI)
- Android: Kotlin + Compose + Hilt + MVI + Coroutines/Flow
- iOS: Swift + SwiftUI + MVVM + structured concurrency
- Web: Next.js App Router + TypeScript strict + Tailwind + Server Components by default
- Firebase: Firestore + Cloud Functions v2 (TypeScript) + security rules deny-by-default
- Python: 3.11+, type hints, pydantic, pytest, asyncio
- Go: 1.22+, interface-based, errgroup, table-driven tests
- Rust: 2021 edition, thiserror/anyhow, clippy pedantic, tokio
- SQL: parameterized queries, timestamptz, reversible migrations
- Docker: multi-stage, non-root, health checks, pinned images
- Terraform: remote state + locking, plan before apply, prevent_destroy on critical resources
- Testing: 80% coverage minimum on new code
- Security: validate all inputs, no hardcoded secrets, parameterized queries

Available skills (80 total) — see docs/OVERVIEW.md for full domain-organized list. Highlights:

Engineering (39): sdlc, ai-feature-builder, llmops, mcp-server-builder, rag-architect, agent-designer, agent-workflow-designer, api-architect, api-gateway, database-architect, firebase-architect, android-feature-scaffold, ios-architect, nextjs-feature-scaffold, stripe-integration, monorepo-navigator, git-worktree-manager, env-secrets-manager, performance-review, code-audit, e2e-testing, testing-strategy, design-system, micro-frontends, edge-computing, offline-first, i18n, notification-architect, ci-cd-pipeline, data-migration, feature-flags, growth-engineering, analytics-implementation, stitch-design, android-design-expert, ios-design-expert, web-design-expert, test-accounts, ai-security

Platform (10): project-bootstrap, infrastructure-scaffold, observability, incident-response, disaster-recovery, release-management, cure-infra-bootstrap, interview-system-designer, self-improving-memory, git-workflow

Product (10): product-manager, product-design, market-research, customer-onboarding, feature-audit, technology-radar, portfolio-registry, uat, product-strategy, product-ops

Business (11): engineering-cost-model, saas-financial-model, burn-rate-tracker, finops, investor-reporting, fundraising-materials, proposal-generator, comps-analysis, dcf-modeling, merger-modeling, equity-research

Marketing (5): go-to-market, product-marketing, seo-content-engine, content-related GTM, technical-blog-writer

Security (4): security-review, accessibility-audit, compliance-architect, qsbs-compliance

Legal (1): legal-doc-scaffold

Agents (39):
  Engineering: code-reviewer, test-runner, pr-reviewer, refactor-assistant, ci-debugger, release-coordinator, doc-generator, codebase-explainer, migration-validator, deployment-validator, dependency-auditor, api-validator, project-bootstrapper, qa-engineer, system-architect
  Product: product-analyst, ux-researcher, roadmap-strategist, competitive-intel
  Marketing: content-strategist, campaign-analyst, brand-guardian, growth-analyst, technical-content-strategist
  Business: financial-analyst, market-intelligence, investor-relations, contract-reviewer, ops-finance, investment-banker, equity-analyst, private-equity-analyst
  Data: data-analyst, metrics-dashboard, ab-test-analyst
  Security & Legal: accessibility-checker, firebase-security-auditor, legal-compliance, skill-security-auditor

Personas (4): cure-tech-lead, cure-product-lead, cure-engagement-pm, cure-solo-consultant

Run /cure-product-engineering:<skill> to invoke any skill. Adopt a persona by referencing personas/<name>.md.'

echo 'Context compacted. Cure Consulting Group plugin active — 80 skills, 39 agents, 4 personas available. Use /cure-product-engineering:<skill-name> to invoke. Run cat docs/OVERVIEW.md in plugin dir for full inventory.'
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then echo "Updated $FILE"; fi
CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); echo "Executed: $CMD"
CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); echo "Command failed: $CMD. Analyzing output..."

PROMPT=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('prompt','').lower()[:500])" 2>/dev/null); case "$PROMPT" in *'delete all'*|*'drop all'*|*'remove everything'*|*'wipe'*|*'nuke'*) echo '{"warning": "Destructive operation detected in prompt. Proceeding with caution — will confirm before any irreversible actions."}' ;; esac; exit 0

FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify .env files directly. Use environment variable management.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *-lock.json|*-lock.yaml|*.lock|*shrinkwrap*) echo 'BLOCKED: Lock files should only be modified by package managers, not manually.' >&2; exit 2 ;; */credentials*|*/secrets*|*serviceAccount*|*service-account*|*.pem|*id_rsa*|*id_ed25519*) echo 'BLOCKED: Credential and secret files must not be modified by AI. Manage these manually.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *.tfstate|*.tfstate.*) echo 'BLOCKED: Terraform state files must never be manually edited. Use terraform state commands.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CMD" ]; then case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf /*'*|*'rm -rf ~'*|*'rm -rf $HOME'*|*'rm -rf .'*|*'mkfs'*|*'dd if='*) echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous system command detected.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; fi; exit 0
AGENT=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('name', d.get('agent_name', 'subagent')))" 2>/dev/null); echo "Hiring specialized expert: @$AGENT"

echo "Expert task complete. Final quality check checklist:
- Tests added? → test-runner agent
- Lint/Types pass? → ci-debugger agent
- PR ready? → pr-reviewer agent
- API gaps → api-validator agent
- No docs for new feature → doc-generator agent

If everything looks good, respond: 'Session complete. All quality checks passed.'"
